pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: Compilation will fail or produce bytecode for the wrong JDK version if the source/target properties are not updated to match the target environment.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent from 2.7.x to 3.3.x to support Java 21 and Jakarta EE.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x does not support Java 21 as a baseline and uses javax.* packages; Spring Boot 3.x is required for Java 21 compatibility and Jakarta EE 9+ namespace.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove explicit javax.annotation-api dependency as it is no longer needed or compatible.
pom.xml.why_exists: The javax.annotation-api artifact is part of the old Java EE namespace; Spring Boot 3/Jakarta EE uses jakarta.annotation, and the old artifact may cause conflicts or be unavailable.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace javax.websocket-api with jakarta.websocket-api to align with Jakarta EE namespace.
pom.xml.why_exists: The javax.websocket package does not exist in Jakarta EE 9+; code referencing it will fail to compile or link without the jakarta.* replacement.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace javax.servlet-api with jakarta.servlet-api to align with Jakarta EE namespace.
pom.xml.why_exists: The javax.servlet package does not exist in Jakarta EE 9+; servlet-based code will fail to compile or link without the jakarta.* replacement.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace javax.mail/mail with jakarta.mail-api to align with Jakarta EE namespace.
pom.xml.why_exists: The javax.mail package does not exist in Jakarta EE 9+; mail-related code will fail to compile or link without the jakarta.* replacement.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace javax.el-api with jakarta.el-api to align with Jakarta EE namespace.
pom.xml.why_exists: The javax.el package does not exist in Jakarta EE 9+; EL-related code will fail to compile or link without the jakarta.* replacement.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add <release> flag to maven-compiler-plugin to enforce Java 21 compilation.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without the release flag, the compiler might not enforce the correct bytecode version or API usage for Java 21, potentially leading to runtime incompatibilities.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace com.sun.xml.bind:jaxb-impl with org.glassfish.jaxb:jaxb-runtime for Jakarta EE compatibility.
pom.xml.why_exists: The old JAXB implementation uses javax.* packages; the new runtime uses jakarta.* packages, which are required for Spring Boot 3/Jakarta EE compatibility.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade jacoco-maven-plugin to a newer version compatible with Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older JaCoCo versions may not support Java 21 bytecode, leading to instrumentation failures.

src/main/java/net/mmo/utils/kism/backend.general_idea: Migrate annotation import from javax.annotation to jakarta.annotation to comply with Jakarta EE namespace changes in Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/net/mmo/utils/kism/backend.why_exists: Compile error: package javax.annotation does not exist in Java 21 / Spring Boot 3 environments where Jakarta EE namespaces are required.

src/main/java/net/mmo/utils/kism/entitie.general_idea: Migrate JPA annotations from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence to align with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/net/mmo/utils/kism/entitie.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+; code fails to compile with 'package javax.persistence does not exist' errors.

src/main/java/net/mmo/utils/kism/entitie.general_idea: Migrate persistence annotations from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence namespace.
src/main/java/net/mmo/utils/kism/entitie.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3.x), causing compile errors for missing classes.

src/main/java/net/mmo/utils/kism/entitie.general_idea: Replace javax.persistence imports with jakarta.persistence to align with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/net/mmo/utils/kism/entitie.why_exists: javax.persistence classes are not present in the classpath when using Spring Boot 3 / Jakarta EE 9+, causing ClassNotFoundException or NoClassDefFoundError at runtime.

src/main/java/net/mmo/utils/kism/entitie.general_idea: Add import for java.io.Serial annotation required for serializable fields in Java 16+.
src/main/java/net/mmo/utils/kism/entitie.why_exists: The @Serial annotation is not available in Java 17; it was introduced in Java 16 and is required to suppress warnings or enforce serialization safety in newer JDKs when used.

src/main/java/net/mmo/utils/kism/entitie.general_idea: Migrate validation annotations from javax.validation to jakarta.validation to align with Jakarta EE 9+ and Spring Boot 3.x requirements.
src/main/java/net/mmo/utils/kism/entitie.why_exists: javax.validation package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+; code will fail to compile if jakarta.validation is not used.

src/main/java/net/mmo/utils/kism/entitie.general_idea: Migrate validation annotations from javax.validation to jakarta.validation to align with Jakarta EE 9+ and Spring Boot 3.x.
src/main/java/net/mmo/utils/kism/entitie.why_exists: javax.validation package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+; code fails to compile with 'package javax.validation does not exist' on JDK 21 with Spring Boot 3.

src/main/java/net/mmo/utils/kism/entitie.general_idea: Migrate validation annotations from javax.validation to jakarta.validation to align with Jakarta EE 9+ and Spring Boot 3.x.
src/main/java/net/mmo/utils/kism/entitie.why_exists: javax.validation package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+; code fails to compile with 'package javax.validation does not exist' on JDK 21 with Spring Boot 3.

src/main/java/net/mmo/utils/kism/entitie.general_idea: Migrate validation annotations from javax.validation to jakarta.validation to align with Jakarta EE 9+ and Spring Boot 3.x.
src/main/java/net/mmo/utils/kism/entitie.why_exists: javax.validation package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+; code fails to compile with 'package javax.validation does not exist' on JDK 21 with Spring Boot 3.

src/main/java/net/mmo/utils/kism/entitie.general_idea: Add @Serial annotation to serialVersionUID field to comply with stricter serialization checks in modern JDKs.
src/main/java/net/mmo/utils/kism/entitie.why_exists: JDK 21 enables stricter serialization checks by default; missing @Serial annotation on serialVersionUID causes a compile error or warning treated as error.

src/main/java/net/mmo/utils/kism/entitie.general_idea: Add import for java.io.Serial annotation required for serializable fields in Java 16+.
src/main/java/net/mmo/utils/kism/entitie.why_exists: Compile error: cannot find symbol 'Serial' if the annotation is used but not imported.

src/main/java/net/mmo/utils/kism/entitie.general_idea: Annotate serialVersionUID field with @Serial to comply with Java 16+ serialization rules.
src/main/java/net/mmo/utils/kism/entitie.why_exists: Compile error: 'serialVersionUID' is not a serializable field and must be annotated with @Serial or removed in Java 16+.

src/main/java/net/mmo/utils/kism/entitie.general_idea: Migrate validation annotations from javax.validation to jakarta.validation to align with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/net/mmo/utils/kism/entitie.why_exists: javax.validation package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+; code fails to compile with 'package javax.validation does not exist' errors.

src/main/java/net/mmo/utils/kism/entitie.general_idea: Migrate validation annotations from javax.validation to jakarta.validation to align with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/net/mmo/utils/kism/entitie.why_exists: javax.validation package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+; code fails to compile with 'package javax.validation does not exist' errors.

src/main/java/net/mmo/utils/kism/entitie.general_idea: Migrate validation annotations from javax.validation to jakarta.validation to align with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/net/mmo/utils/kism/entitie.why_exists: javax.validation package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+; code fails to compile with 'package javax.validation does not exist' errors.

src/main/java/net/mmo/utils/kism/entitie.general_idea: Migrate validation annotation import from javax to jakarta namespace to align with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/net/mmo/utils/kism/entitie.why_exists: Compile error: package javax.validation.constraints does not exist in Jakarta EE 9+ environments (Spring Boot 3).

src/main/java/net/mmo/utils/kism/entitie.general_idea: Add @Serial annotation to serialVersionUID field to comply with Java 17+ serialization rules.
src/main/java/net/mmo/utils/kism/entitie.why_exists: Java 17+ enforces that serialVersionUID fields in serializable classes must be annotated with @Serial (or be effectively final and private static final long) to avoid compile-time errors regarding serial persistence fields.

src/main/java/net/mmo/utils/kism/entitie.general_idea: Migrate JavaMail API imports from javax.mail to jakarta.mail namespace.
src/main/java/net/mmo/utils/kism/entitie.why_exists: javax.mail package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ and incompatible with Spring Boot 3.x which uses Jakarta EE 10.

src/main/java/net/mmo/utils/kism/entitie.general_idea: Migrate Jakarta Validation API imports from javax.validation to jakarta.validation namespace.
src/main/java/net/mmo/utils/kism/entitie.why_exists: javax.validation package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ and incompatible with Spring Boot 3.x which uses Jakarta EE 10.

src/main/java/net/mmo/utils/kism/entitie.general_idea: Update inner class inheritance to use jakarta.mail.Authenticator instead of javax.mail.Authenticator.
src/main/java/net/mmo/utils/kism/entitie.why_exists: javax.mail.Authenticator class is no longer available in the jakarta.mail namespace.

src/main/java/net/mmo/utils/kism/entitie.general_idea: Migrate validation annotations from javax.validation to jakarta.validation to align with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/net/mmo/utils/kism/entitie.why_exists: The javax.validation package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+; using it causes a compile error (package not found) on JDK 21 with Spring Boot 3.

src/main/java/net/mmo/utils/kism/entitie.why_exists: The javax.validation package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+; using it causes a compile error (package not found) on JDK 21 with Spring Boot 3.

src/main/java/net/mmo/utils/kism/entitie.why_exists: The javax.validation package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+; using it causes a compile error (package not found) on JDK 21 with Spring Boot 3.

src/main/java/net/mmo/utils/kism/entitie.general_idea: Add the @Serial annotation to the serialVersionUID field to comply with Java 14+ serialization rules.
src/main/java/net/mmo/utils/kism/entitie.why_exists: Compilation error: serialVersionUID must be annotated with @Serial in Java 14+ if the class implements Serializable.

src/main/java/net/mmo/utils/kism/entitie.general_idea: Add @Serial annotation to serialVersionUID field to comply with Java 17+ serialization rules.
src/main/java/net/mmo/utils/kism/entitie.why_exists: Java 17+ enforces that serialVersionUID fields in serializable classes must be annotated with @Serial to avoid compilation errors or warnings treated as errors in strict builds.

src/main/java/net/mmo/utils/kism/entitie.general_idea: Add @Serial annotation to serialVersionUID field to comply with Java 14+ serialization rules.
src/main/java/net/mmo/utils/kism/entitie.why_exists: Compilation error: serialVersionUID field in a serializable class must be annotated with @Serial in Java 14+.

src/main/java/net/mmo/utils/kism/entitie.general_idea: Migrate validation annotations from javax.validation to jakarta.validation to align with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace changes required by Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/net/mmo/utils/kism/entitie.why_exists: javax.validation package is no longer available in Jakarta EE 9+ environments; code fails to compile with 'package javax.validation does not exist'.

src/main/java/net/mmo/utils/kism/entitie.why_exists: javax.validation package is no longer available in Jakarta EE 9+ environments; code fails to compile with 'package javax.validation does not exist'.

src/main/java/net/mmo/utils/kism/securit.general_idea: Migrate servlet API import from javax to jakarta namespace to align with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/net/mmo/utils/kism/securit.why_exists: Class javax.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest does not exist in the classpath when using Spring Boot 3 / Jakarta EE 9+, causing a compilation error.

src/main/java/net/mmo/utils/kism/ui/Main.general_idea: Add import for java.io.Serial annotation required for serializable fields in Java 17+.
src/main/java/net/mmo/utils/kism/ui/Main.why_exists: Compile error: cannot find symbol 'Serial' if the annotation is used but not imported.

src/main/java/net/mmo/utils/kism/ui/util.general_idea: Add java.io.Serial import to support the new annotation for serial version UIDs.
src/main/java/net/mmo/utils/kism/ui/util.why_exists: The @Serial annotation is part of java.io in Java 17+ and is required to suppress warnings or enforce serialization rules in modern Java versions; without the import, the code will not compile if the annotation is used.

src/main/java/net/mmo/utils/kism/ui/view.general_idea: Replace deprecated List.add(int index, E element) with List.addFirst(E e) for adding to the beginning of a list.
src/main/java/net/mmo/utils/kism/ui/view.why_exists: List.add(int, E) is deprecated for removal in Java 21 when used on List implementations that support addFirst/addLast.

src/main/java/net/mmo/utils/kism/ui/view.general_idea: Migrate security annotation from javax to jakarta namespace to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/net/mmo/utils/kism/ui/view.why_exists: The javax.annotation package was removed in Java EE/Jakarta EE migration; using javax.annotation.security.RolesAllowed causes a compile error (package not found) in Spring Boot 3 environments.

src/main/java/net/mmo/utils/kism/ui/view.general_idea: Replace javax.annotation.security import with jakarta.annotation.security to align with Jakarta EE namespace changes in Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/net/mmo/utils/kism/ui/view.why_exists: The javax.annotation package was removed from the JDK and replaced by jakarta.annotation in Jakarta EE 9+. Without this change, the import will fail to resolve, causing a compilation error.

src/main/java/net/mmo/utils/kism/ui/view.general_idea: Replace javax.annotation.security import with jakarta.annotation.security to align with Jakarta EE namespace in Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/net/mmo/utils/kism/ui/view.why_exists: The javax.annotation package was removed from the JDK and replaced by jakarta.annotation in Jakarta EE 9+; using the old import causes a compile error (package not found).

src/main/java/net/mmo/utils/kism/ui/view.general_idea: Add import for java.io.Serial annotation required for serial version UID fields in Java 16+.
src/main/java/net/mmo/utils/kism/ui/view.why_exists: Compile error: cannot find symbol 'Serial' if the annotation is used but not imported.

src/main/java/net/mmo/utils/kism/ui/view.general_idea: Annotate serialVersionUID field with @Serial to comply with Java 16+ serialization best practices.
src/main/java/net/mmo/utils/kism/ui/view.why_exists: Compile error: serialVersionUID field must be annotated with @Serial in Java 16+ if the class implements Serializable.
